# Pull Request

## Summary / 摘要

-

## Scope / 范围

- [ ] Docs or examples only
- [ ] CLI / core behavior
- [ ] Reports or dashboard viewer
- [ ] GitHub Action
- [ ] Other:

## Safety Checks / 安全检查

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or private data added
- [ ] No hosted service, login, billing, database, or cloud sync added
- [ ] `.runwise/` generated artifacts are not tracked
- [ ] English and Chinese docs are mirrored when public-facing text changed

## Validation / 验证

```bash
pnpm check
pnpm check:types
pnpm test
pnpm exec runwise doctor
```

## Notes / 备注

-
